data.question: What is the capital of France?
documents: France is a country in Western Europe.
Paris is the capital of France.
The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris.
London is the capital of England.

data.question: Who was the president of the United States in 1980?
documents: Ronald Reagan was an American politician.
Reagan served as president from 1981 to 1989.
Jimmy Carter was president before Reagan.
